text: Don't, don't, don't. Okay, starting with the S word, focus the tip slightly close, tongue behind, deep, deep, air flows smoothly. Sun, sip, sand, sip, sea, sea, soft, soap, same, sieve, basic words such as basic, lesson, music, pencil, sunset, focus, class, mis-pass. Other such as S, air blends in them are star, smile, school, school, stop, slow, snake, strong, speak. C-s-s-she, cells, she-s-s, sun, shines softly, same-sits silently, six snakes, six small snakes, slide, students are designs, she-s-s-s-s-s-s, by the she-sore, that's it.
